title: Third-Party and Vendor Risk Assessment Pack

intake_questions.text: How many active third-party vendors have access to your systems or data?
Is there a formal vendor risk management policy in place?
Are security requirements included in all third-party contracts?
Do any vendors have access to personal data subject to GDPR or DPDP?
Has a vendor security incident occurred in the last 24 months?

scope_template.prompt: Identify the procurement and contract management functions involved in vendor oversight
List critical vendors — those with access to sensitive data or critical systems
Confirm any vendor categories explicitly excluded from this assessment

requirements.text: A third-party risk management policy must define vendor classification, due diligence requirements, contract security standards, and ongoing monitoring obligations.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Vendor risk management policy; vendor classification matrix; due diligence questionnaire templates

requirements.text: A current inventory of all active third parties with access to systems or data must be maintained including classification by criticality and data access.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Vendor inventory register; criticality classification; data access scope per vendor; update frequency records

requirements.text: Security due diligence assessments proportionate to vendor criticality must be conducted before onboarding and at least annually for critical vendors.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Completed vendor security questionnaires; risk ratings; pre-onboarding approval records; annual reassessment evidence

requirements.text: Security requirements including data protection clauses, breach notification obligations, right-to-audit, and exit provisions must be embedded in all vendor contracts.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Sample vendor contracts with security schedules; standard security contract clauses; DPAs for data processors

requirements.text: Ongoing monitoring of critical vendor security posture must include periodic reassessment, threat intelligence feeds, and incident notification tracking.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Vendor monitoring process; reassessment schedule; threat intelligence subscription evidence; vendor incident log

evidence_requests.title: Vendor Risk Management Policy
evidence_requests.description: Vendor risk policy including classification criteria, due diligence requirements, and monitoring obligations

evidence_requests.title: Third-Party Vendor Inventory
evidence_requests.description: Complete vendor register with data access scope, criticality classification, and last review date

evidence_requests.title: Vendor Security Assessment Records
evidence_requests.description: Completed questionnaires and risk ratings for critical vendors; pre-onboarding approval records

evidence_requests.title: Sample Vendor Contracts with Security Clauses
evidence_requests.description: 3 sample vendor contracts demonstrating security schedule inclusions and DPAs for data processors

evidence_requests.title: Vendor Monitoring Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Annual reassessment records for top 5 critical vendors; vendor incident notification log

task_templates.title: Review vendor risk policy for completeness and alignment
Assess vendor inventory completeness and classification accuracy
Evaluate due diligence process for critical vendors
Review sample vendor contracts for security clause adequacy
Interview procurement and legal teams on vendor risk process
Identify concentration risk — critical functions depending on single vendor

finding_templates.title_pattern: Critical vendor {vendor_name} not assessed within required period

severity_model.critical: Critical vendor with no security assessment or contract; unmanaged supply chain risk; regulatory exposure
severity_model.high: Significant vendor risk gap; high-criticality vendor without adequate controls or oversight
severity_model.medium: Process gap in vendor risk management; medium-risk vendor without full compliance
severity_model.low: Minor vendor risk improvement; low-criticality vendor with minor documentation gaps
severity_model.informational: Enhancement recommendation with no immediate vendor risk impact

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Vendor Assessment Questionnaire Review
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review vendor responses to security questionnaire; identify gaps requiring follow-up evidence or on-site review

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Security Contract Clause Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review proposed vendor contract; advise on security schedule requirements, breach notification SLAs, and audit rights

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Vendor Tiering and Monitoring Design
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Design vendor tiering model and proportionate monitoring cadence for each tier
